evidence: Screenshot: auth-gate-dashboard.png — Navigating to /dashboard without auth shows 'AGENCY - Connect your wallet' gate with 'Sign in' button instead of dashboard content
Screenshot: auth-gate-cockpit.png — Navigating to /cockpit without auth shows same auth gate
Screenshot: auth-sign-in-options.png — Sign-in modal shows: Continue with Google, Email address input, Passkey, and Connect a Wallet options
All four auth methods visible: Google (in-app), Email (in-app), Passkey (in-app), Connect a Wallet (external wallet connector)
